findings.title: Evidence-gating is declarative only in S10 transition guards
findings.disposition: S10 intentionally enforces only lifecycle adjacency; required-evidence enforcement is explicitly deferred to RP00.P01.M07.S11 validation helper, and the transition evidence keys are recorded for that future helper.

findings.title: blocked is modeled as terminal and non-recoverable
findings.disposition: Terminal blocked behavior matches sibling HermesGate and HumanApproval transition maps and is retained for this registry artifact lifecycle.

findings.title: Out-of-diff lifecycle/status dependencies are pinned by tests and validator
findings.disposition: The existing status-value and terminal-status sources remain pinned by model tests and RP00 validator checks.

findings.title: Fixture consistency labels were absent from fixture JSON
findings.disposition: The synthetic fixture now includes valid_closeout_transition, invalid_skip_transition, invalid_terminal_transition, and synthetic_only fields, with tests and validator coverage.

findings.title: Confirm no stale global nextSubphase S10 assertion remains
findings.disposition: A targeted rg check confirmed no stale CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY.nextSubphase expectation for RP00.P01.M07.S10 remains; the only remaining S10 assertion is S09 optional registry nextSubphase.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S10 state-transition-map slice with no P0/P1, no S11 overreach, no new enum values, and synthetic-only no-write behavior. The only P2 is an explicit S11-boundary defer for evidence-gating enforcement.
